channel.title: ChurnRecovery Blog
channel.description: Insights on churn recovery, payment failures, and SaaS retention

item.title: Payment Failure Recovery: A Technical Playbook
item.description: How to build a dunning system that actually recovers failed payments and keeps revenue flowing.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to SaaS Churn: Causes, Metrics, and Recovery Strategies
item.description: Everything you need to know about measuring, understanding, and reducing churn in your SaaS business — from basic metrics to advanced recovery tactics.

item.title: 7 Cancel Flow Examples That Actually Save Customers (With Code)
item.description: Real cancel flow patterns from successful SaaS companies, with implementation examples you can steal for your own product.

item.title: Involuntary Churn: The Revenue Leak You're Probably Ignoring
item.description: Failed payments cause 20-40% of all SaaS churn. Here's exactly how to build a dunning system that recovers most of it.

item.title: Why ChurnRecovery Is Free (And How We Plan to Stay That Way)
item.description: The business model behind giving away churn recovery tooling for free. No, it's not a bait-and-switch. Here's exactly how it works.

item.title: Subscription Revenue: Protecting the Asset
item.description: A guide to managing Intentional vs. Unintentional Churn in subscription models.
